subject: Need confirmation on the workshop date
body: Can you confirm whether the workshop is still planned for next Thursday? If the schedule changed, please let me know the new time.

subject: Invoice received
body: This is just a confirmation that we received your payment.

subject: Need the onboarding checklist
body: Hi team, could you send me the onboarding checklist for the pilot workspace setup? Also let me know where I can find the docs portal.

subject: Thanks for the quick help
body: Thanks again for fixing the access issue so quickly. No action needed from my side.
